mapper.sql: id, position_code, target_type, target_id, cover, sort_num, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from home_recommend where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into home_recommend(position_code, target_type, target_id, cover, sort_num, status) values(#{positionCode}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{cover}, #{sortNum}, #{status})
mapper.update: update home_recommend set position_code = #{positionCode}, target_type = #{targetType}, target_id = #{targetId}, cover = #{cover}, sort_num = #{sortNum}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from home_recommend where position_code = #{positionCode} and status = 'enabled' order by sort_num desc, update_time desc, id desc
select count(1) from home_recommend where position_code = #{positionCode} and status = 'enabled'
